evidence.claim: The system can flag units near or past expiration
evidence.fact: It automatically monitors the expiry of blood units and removes outdated ones from circulation.

evidence.fact_span: monitors the expiry of blood units

evidence.claim: When a blood unit is received, the expiration date is calculated
evidence.fact: The expiry of a blood unit is fixed at 42 days after collection.

evidence.fact_span: expiry of a blood unit is fixed at 42 days after collection
